arts.ttl: Lecce Secure Danilo Veiga: Agreement Reached with Estrela Amadora
arts.sum: In a late-night development, Lecce have successfully concluded negotiations for the acquisition of Danilo Veiga from Estrela Amadora. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the agreement, reached in the early hours of Sunday, marks a significant reinforcement for Marco Giampaolo's squad as they enter the second half of the season. The post Lecce Secure Danilo Veiga: Agreement Reached with Estrela Amadora appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Lecce v Inter: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Inter Milan face ongoing challenges ahead of their match against Lecce, with key players sidelined, as influential midfielder Hakan Calhanoglu remains out with a thigh injury and veteran defender Francesco Acerbi returns to the treatment room. Despite these setbacks, manager Simone Inzaghi has a potential bright spot in Yann Bisseck, who has recently resumed training and may feature on the bench. The post Serie A | Lecce v Inter: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Prepare Fresh Bid for Lecce Star Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are reluctant to pull the brakes on their effort to sign Patrick Dorgu despite seeing their opening bid turned down by Lecce. According to Fabrizio Romano, the Red Devils will soon lodge a new offer for the sought-after youngster. The post Man Utd Prepare Fresh Bid for Lecce Star Patrick Dorgu appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly giving serious consideration to re-signing Alvaro Fernandez from Benfica before the end of the January transfer window.
